validation_year: 2025 (rules in force 30 June 2025: EUROMOD DE_2025 snapshot; GETTSIM policy_date 2025-06-30)
note: Dual-oracle instrument map (EUROMOD DE_2025 and GETTSIM 1.2.1 shared surface) to governing German federal law. Instrument keys name the concept with each oracle's variable identifiers where known. Governing-law attributions are working references until capture; source URLs are hunting grounds, not captured provenance - capture happens in axiom-corpus manifests. All statutes are served as consolidated juris XML by gesetze-im-internet.de.

instruments.instrument: Einkommensteuer (personal income tax; EUROMOD tin_de, GETTSIM einkommensteuer__betrag_y_sn)
instruments.governing_law: Einkommensteuergesetz (EStG): section 32a tariff formula (Grundfreibetrag EUR 12,096 in 2025; progressive zones), section 2 income categories and assessment base, section 9a employee standard deduction (Arbeitnehmer-Pauschbetrag EUR 1,230), section 10 Vorsorgeaufwendungen deductions, sections 26/26b/32a(5) joint assessment and splitting, section 32(6) child allowances with the section 31 Guenstigerpruefung against Kindergeld
Solidaritaetszuschlaggesetz 1995 (SolzG 1995): section 3 exemption threshold (Freigrenze, EUR 19,950 single / 39,900 joint for 2025), section 4 rate (5.5 percent) with the marginal mitigation zone

SGB V: section 241 general contribution rate (14.6 percent), section 242 supplementary rate (kassenindividueller Zusatzbeitrag; the statutory average announced per section 242a is what both models apply), section 249 employer/employee halves; contribution assessment ceiling per the annual Sozialversicherungsrechengroessenverordnung (SGB IV sections 17/18)

SGB XI section 55: 3.6 percent base rate (2025), 0.6 percentage-point childless surcharge (section 55(3)), per-child abatements for parents with two or more children under 25 (2023 reform), Saxony employer-share special split
SGB VI sections 157-160 (contribution rate fixed at 18.6 percent, Beitragsbemessungsgrenze per the annual Rechengroessenverordnung - unified East/West from 2025)
SGB III section 341 (2.6 percent), halves per section 346

SGB IV section 8 (geringfuegige Beschaeftigung, EUR 556/month threshold 2025, dynamic per minimum-wage formula), section 20(2/2a) Uebergangsbereich EUR 556.01-2,000 with the reduced employee-share formula
EStG sections 62-66 (tax-law route; EUR 255/child/month from 2025-01, section 66(1)) and Bundeskindergeldgesetz (BKGG) for the social-law route; age and education conditions per section 32(4)
BKGG section 6a: maximum amount coupled to the child sächliches Existenzminimum (EUR 297/month in 2025), income bands and withdrawal

instruments.instrument: Buergergeld / Arbeitslosengeld II (EUROMOD bsa_de family, GETTSIM arbeitslosengeld_2__betrag_m_bg)
instruments.governing_law: SGB II: section 20 Regelbedarfe (2025: EUR 563 single, couple 506 each, child bands 357/390/471 per the Regelbedarfsstufen), section 21 Mehrbedarfe, section 22 Kosten der Unterkunft und Heizung, section 11/11b income disregards and the section 30 earned-income allowances

Wohngeldgesetz (WoGG): section 19 formula with the annexed parameters, Mietstufen I-VII per the Wohngeldverordnung, the 2023 Wohngeld-Plus level with permanent heating/climate components and biennial indexation (2025 update)

Bundeselterngeld- und Elternzeitgesetz (BEEG): sections 2-4 replacement-rate formula (65-100 percent bands, EUR 300 minimum / 1,800 maximum), income cap on eligibility (EUR 175,000 taxable for births from April 2025)
Unterhaltsvorschussgesetz (UhVorschG) sections 1-2: minimum-maintenance-linked amounts net of Kindergeld, age bands 0-5/6-11/12-17
Composition of the instruments above under the 2025 law state; suite-level parity against both oracles' disposable-income aggregates
